notes: JS/TS unused files/exports/deps detector by Lars Kappert (webpro). README states: "/ˈknɪp/ means '(to) cut' and is pronounced with a hard K" (Dutch). The K is NOT silent — say it "k-nip", NOT English "nip". Single short-i syllable as in "nip". macOS `say` silences the K on raw "knip", so the respelling uses a light schwa ("kuh nip") to force a hard-K onset — closest `say` gets to a true /kn/ cluster.
